mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pw_user_points (user_id, total_points, used_points, current_points, user_level, last_sign_in_time, continuous_sign_in_days, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{totalPoints}, #{usedPoints}, #{currentPoints}, #{userLevel}, #{lastSignInTime}, #{continuousSignInDays}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE pw_user_points SET total_points = #{totalPoints}, used_points = #{usedPoints}, current_points = #{currentPoints}, user_level = #{userLevel}, last_sign_in_time = #{lastSignInTime}, continuous_sign_in_days = #{continuousSignInDays}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pw_points_record (record_id, user_id, points, type, source, remark, related_id, created_at) VALUES (#{recordId}, #{userId}, #{points}, #{type}, #{source}, #{remark}, #{relatedId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pw_points_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}
